summary: Specialized Gameplay Programmer. Built production-grade combat systems, multiplayer architectures (EOS/Netcode), and player-centric mechanics using Unreal Engine 5 (C++/Blueprints). Proven expertise in systems design, state management, and performant gameplay at scale.

experience.title: Game Developer (Unreal Engine)
details: Designed, developed, and maintained gameplay systems using Unreal Engine 5 leveraging C++ and Blueprints for scalable and maintainable code.
Developed multiplayer networking features including server–client architecture, actor replication, RPCs, and session management.
Created AI systems for enemies and NPCs using Behavior Trees, State Machines, and custom Unreal AI logic.
Built reusable tools and gameplay components to improve iteration speed and support designer-driven workflows.

experience.title: Game Developer (Unity Engine)
details: Developed and maintained gameplay systems in Unity (C#) for a 2D slime platformer and a word game, implementing core mechanics, progression, and game states.
Built UI and interaction systems using Unity UI and TextMeshPro including scoring, feedback, and player progression features.
Optimized and refactored gameplay code for performance, stability, and maintainability, collaborating remotely with designers and artists via version control.

experience.title: Extern (Mobalytics)
details: Completed a remote externship gaining hands-on exposure to game analytics, market research, and player behavior analysis.
Conducted an in-depth genre-focused analysis evaluating core game mechanics, KPIs, monetization models, and player psychology.
Synthesized research findings into a structured presentation with actionable recommendations on market expansion and design opportunities.

projects.title: Realm Rival
projects.description: Server-authoritative multiplayer with client-side prediction. Real-time team balancing, replication-driven state management, and frame-perfect combat synchronization across networked players.

projects.title: Word Dash
projects.description: Session-based multiplayer architecture with GameInstance/GameMode/PlayerState hierarchy. Data-driven word validation, turn-based game state machine, and real-time score replication across clients.

projects.title: Legend of Indra vs Vritrasur
projects.description: Combat system architecture with responsive hit detection, enemy behavior trees, and narrative-driven state progression. Quest system integration with player choice pathways and dynamic objective flow.

projects.title: Isles Of Echoes On Cybertrom
projects.description: Mission scripting framework with branching quest logic, traversal state management, and environmental interaction systems. Dynamic objective flow with player agency and consequence tracking.

projects.title: Reality Run
projects.description: Procedural obstacle generation with difficulty scaling tied to score milestones. Dynamic camera pressure mechanics, collision-based state transitions, and performance-optimized pooling systems.

projects.title: Rewind Component System
projects.description: State capture/replay architecture with temporal logic. Input-to-action pipeline with rewind state restoration, particle synchronization, and audio feedback systems. Demonstrates clean component-based design.

projects.title: RPG Systems Architecture
projects.description: Modular combat framework with reusable attack components, damage system architecture, and enemy AI hierarchy. Character progression integration with equipment systems and stat scaling.

projects.title: Lost Cure
projects.description: Objective-driven game state machine with cinematic integration. Tension-building mechanics through dynamic pacing, environmental narrative progression, and player consequence tracking systems.

projects.title: It's Me Pico
projects.description: Competitive gameplay loop with real-time tile ownership tracking and NavMesh-based AI difficulty scaling. Economy system with persistent progression, quest data structures, and monetization integration.

projects.title: Slimey Jump
projects.description: Vertical endless platformer with drag-based trajectory prediction. Procedural platform generation with weighted spawn rules, card-based progression system, and hybrid active/idle mode with offline rewards calculation.

projects.title: Bubble Trap
projects.description: Arena-based action with bubble lifecycle management and physics-driven interaction system. Enemy AI with chase and attack patterns, reward drop architecture, and multi-level progression tracking.

projects.title: Word Game
projects.description: Location-based progression with meta economy systems. Word validation logic, room state machines, NPC dialogue routing, and collectible reward structures integrated with persistent player profile data.
projects.tech: Unity C# | Data Structures | State Management

projects.title: Surprise Sprint
projects.description: Procedurally-generated infinite runner with event-driven architecture. Power-up system with timed effect lifecycle, score multiplier logic, and PlayerPrefs-based persistence for cross-session progression.

education: Bachelor of Engineering - Computer Science (Graphics And Gaming), Chandigarh University, Mohali, Punjab, IN (2022-2026) — CGPA: 8.41
